name: Set of 2 Wood Lattice Wall Hanging Brown - Threshold™: Elegant Decorative Panels, Modern Geometric Design
description: Give your space an elevated look when you add the Set of 2 Wood Lattice Wall Hangings from Threshold™ to your interior. These decorative lattices have an elegant look with their airy, carved detailing and light, natural hue. Display these wall lattices to give your room a more open feeling with a sophisticated touch. You can even customize them to suit your aesthetic by displaying small accents within the cutouts of the lattices for a bit more dimension. Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you. Due to lighting and monitor differences, actual colors and finishes may vary slightly from what appears online.
